title: Create: Nether Industry
description: A Create addon themed around the Nether.
body:
# Create: Nether Industry

This is an addon for the Create mod, aiming to establish a Create-styled production line centered around a Nether theme.

## Features

### "Soul Stripping" Fan Processing
* Reverts some soul-bound products to their original form and has a chance to yield a Soul Particle.

### Soul Condenser
* A kinetic component that transforms fluids, converting Thin Soul Fluid into Thick Soul Syrup. You can also import custom fluid transformation recipes via datapacks.

### Nylium Farmland
* Adds two types of Nylium Farmland, obtained by right-clicking the corresponding Nylium blocks with a hoe. They need to be irrigated with lava and support new corresponding crops.
* Golden Carrots can now be planted on any Nylium Farmland.
* Craft Blaze Twigs using Blaze Rods, **Gold Blocks**, and Saplings. They can only be planted on Crimson Nylium Farmland and produce Blaze Powder when mature.
* Wither Roses can now be planted on Warped Nylium Farmland, dropping several Wither Roses when mature.

### Ensouled Tools
* Adds a new pickaxe and axe. They do not consume durability in the Nether, and their efficiency (mining/breaking speed) and damage are doubled there.

### Nether-themed Crafting Recipes
* Skeleton Skulls and Wither Skeleton Skulls can now be crafted using Create's mechanical processes.
* Blaze Rods and Ghast Tears can be obtained through Sequenced Assembly.
  
### Lava Speedboat
* Vehicle used to travel on the lava sea.

### Fool's Gold
* Trading currencies that fooled the Piglin.

### Lava Stroke Engine
* A stress source usable in the Nether. Supplies lava to generate stress output.

### JEI & Ponder
* JEI recipe integration and Ponder scenes have been added.

## Future Plans
* More Nether-themed processing chains.
* A full set of equipment and tools suitable for Nether exploration and combat.
* Soul Potions with different "moods" and infinite duration.
* And other items and gameplay mechanics centered around the Nether Industry theme.
